songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 4th nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day spends its 30th week in Personal Hot 100 this week.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 29 spots to #1.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 91% to 225 points.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 105 streams units.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 203,665 total units.

songs.title: Uptight
feed: “Uptight” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 15 spots to #2.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 36 sales units.
